records.title: adding a product shows a cart badge count of one
records.acText: On /inventory.html, standard_user clicks 'Add to cart' on 'Sauce Labs Backpack'; the header cart badge shows '1'.

records.title: adding three products shows a badge of three and lists them in add order
records.acText: standard_user adds Backpack, Bike Light, and Bolt T-Shirt; the cart badge shows '3' and the cart lists the three products top-to-bottom in the order added.

records.title: a cart row shows the quantity, title, description, price, and a remove button
records.acText: On /cart.html, the 'Sauce Labs Backpack' row displays quantity '1', its title, its catalog description, price '$29.99', and a 'Remove' button.

records.title: removing a product drops it from the cart and decrements the badge
records.acText: With Backpack + Bike Light in the cart (badge '2'), clicking 'Remove' on the Backpack row removes that row; only Bike Light remains and the badge shows '1'.

records.title: continue shopping returns to the inventory page
records.acText: On /cart.html, clicking 'Continue Shopping' returns standard_user to /inventory.html.

records.title: removing the last item hides the cart badge
records.acText: With exactly one item in the cart, clicking 'Remove' drops the count to 0 and the cart badge disappears entirely (no badge element rendered).

records.title: adding a product toggles its inventory button to Remove
records.acText: On /inventory.html, clicking 'Add to cart' on 'Sauce Labs Backpack' changes that product's button label to 'Remove' (saucedemo caps quantity at 1 per product).

records.title: cart contents persist after continue shopping
records.acText: standard_user adds Backpack, clicks Continue Shopping, then re-opens the cart; Backpack is still listed and the badge still shows '1'.
